senior_65_plus_online_id_option.purpose: Voluntarily surrender driver license and apply for a Texas identification card (ID) without visiting an office
eligibility: Holds a REAL ID compliant Texas driver license or commercial driver license
how_to: Create or sign in to a Texas-by-Texas (TxT) account (Texas.gov)
Select 'Surrender DL for ID' and submit required verification information (identity, citizenship, age)

office_visit_steps: Schedule an appointment at local driver license office
Complete driver license application (online or at office)
Specialist reviews application/medical history for additional testing needs
Provide required documentation (application; citizenship/lawful presence as applicable; identity proof)

possible_additional_requirements_if_conc: Additional medical information from a doctor may be requested
testing_policy.reference: Texas Medical Evaluation Process for Driver Licensing page is linked from the senior drivers page

linked_resources: Texas Department of State Health Services (DSHS)
